vulnerabilities.name: Cross-site Scripting (XSS)
vulnerabilities.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation
preventionMethods: Encode output based on context (HTML, JavaScript, URL, CSS)
Validate and sanitize all user inputs
Use HTTPOnly and Secure cookie flags

vulnerabilities.name: SQL Injection
vulnerabilities.description: Improper neutralization of special elements used in SQL command
preventionMethods: Use ORM with proper parameter binding
Principle of least privilege for database users

vulnerabilities.name: Path Traversal
vulnerabilities.description: Improper limitation of a pathname to a restricted directory
preventionMethods: Check resolved path against base directory

vulnerabilities.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)
vulnerabilities.description: Insufficient CSRF protection allows unauthorized actions
preventionMethods: Use custom headers for API requests

vulnerabilities.name: Improper Authentication
preventionMethods: Implement rate limiting on login attempts

vulnerabilities.name: Information Exposure
vulnerabilities.description: Exposure of sensitive information to unauthorized actors

vulnerabilities.name: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
vulnerabilities.description: Application fetches remote resources without validating the URL

vulnerabilities.name: Deserialization of Untrusted Data
vulnerabilities.description: Unsafe deserialization can lead to RCE

codeExamples.vulnerable:
// VULNERABLE - unsafe deserialization
const obj = eval('(' + userInput + ')');
